info.name: CF2-CancellationOverdue
info.description: Overdue road (cash immediate-charge cancel => BAP DUE entries + BPP overdue legs: driver 4.00+0.96, platform-kept benefit 1.00+0.24). Two sub-cases on two rides. A) settled-after-overdue: clearDues BEFORE any payout => overdue legs (incl. benefit) REVERSE, full fee 5.00+1.20 + full commission 0.93 book, and refunds behave exactly like the settle-now road with ZERO benefit-refund legs (proves standingOverdueBenefit nets out reversals). B) STANDING overdue: driver overdue legs SQL-marked PAID_OUT (simulated payout; the willReverse veto counts only driver entries), clearDues keeps the overdue => OVERDUE commission 0.744 books, and the refunds return THREE buckets pro-rata - driver share, commission slice, and the platform benefit give-back (CancellationOverdueBenefitRefund/..RefundTax) - telescoping to driver 4.216 + commission 0.744 + benefit 1.24 = 6.20. Self-contained; requires the cancellation-due ledger fixes (fix-cancellation-ledger-and-overdue) in the running build.

item.name: BOOT: bust config caches (redis DEL + in-proc force-cleanup broadcast)

exec: // Config flags live behind 2 caches: redis CachedQueries (24h TTL) + a 1h in-process map.
// The in-process layer honours a broadcast key (Kernel.Storage.InMem cleanup thread, 60s tick):
// <appPrefix>inmem:force:cleanup:timeofday evicts keys containing forceCleanupKeyPrefix when the
// cache pre-dates the timestamp. 23:59:59 always post-dates a same-day boot, so it always fires.
pm.test('cache-bust primary DEL ok', function(){ pm.expect(pm.response.code, pm.response.text()).to.be.oneOf([200,201]); });
dels.forEach(function(d){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/redis/del', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw: JSON.stringify(d)} }, function(){}); });
var val = JSON.stringify({forceCleanupTimestamp:'23:59:59'}); // NO keyPrefix => FULL in-mem wipe each 60s tick (covers FarePolicy snapshots etc.); key self-expires 600s after first consumption
pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/redis/set', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({key:k, value:val, target:t})} }, function(){});

request.description: CARD booking carrying the stripe-mock's pm_card_captureFail: the immediate cancellation charge FAILS (card_declined) => markDueOnFailure books DUE entries + syncs OverdueCancellationLedger (SharedLogic/CancellationFee.hs). ride.onlinePayment stays TRUE so the fee is refundable after clearDues - unlike a cash booking, which createPaymentRefundRequest hard-rejects ('Could not refund cash ride').

item.name: Driver Arrived at Pickup - ride A

exec: // on_update(DRIVER_ARRIVED) can race KV/drainer visibility of the fresh BAP ride row and 500
// (RIDE_DOES_NOT_EXIST from getRideAndBooking) - rows are consistent in postgres moments later.
// Retry up to 8x5s before failing; the call is idempotent (sets driver_arrival_time).

function _fin(ok, detail){ pm.test('Driver arrived at pickup (retry-tolerant)', function(){ pm.expect(ok, detail||'').to.be.true; }); if(ok) console.log('Driver arrived at pickup - driver_arrival_time is now set'); }

function _retry(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url: pm.request.url.toString(), method:'POST', header:_hdrs(), body:{mode:'raw', raw: pm.variables.replaceIn(pm.request.body && pm.request.body.raw || '')} }, function(err,res){
else if(n<=0){ _fin(false, 'arrived/pickup still failing after retries: ' + (err|| (res&&res.code) ) + ' ' + (res? res.text().substring(0,160):'')); }
else { console.log('arrived/pickup retry, attempts left', n, 'last:', res&&res.code); setTimeout(function(){ _retry(n-1); }, 5000); }
if (pm.response.code === 200) { _fin(true); } else { console.log('arrived/pickup got', pm.response.code, '- retrying (KV visibility race)'); _retry(8); }

item.name: A: BPP overdue legs standing (driver 4.00+0.96, benefit 1.00+0.24, no commission)

exec: // Cash immediate-charge cancel => OverdueCancellationLedger: driver gets the overdue charge, the
// platform KEEPS (fee - overdue) as benefit (pass-through PAIR of equal legs per ref). No commission yet.
function _sumOf(rows,t){ return rows.filter(function(r){ return r.reference_type===t && r.status==='SETTLED' && !r.reversal_of; }).reduce(function(a,r){ return a+Number(r.amount); }, 0); }
function _legAmt(rows,t){ var l=rows.filter(function(r){ return r.reference_type===t && r.status==='SETTLED' && !r.reversal_of; }); return l.length? Number(l[0].amount): 0; }

function _ok(rows){ function cnt(t){ return rows.filter(function(r){ return r.reference_type===t && r.status==='SETTLED' && !r.reversal_of; }).length; } return cnt('OverdueCancellationCharge')>=2 && cnt('OverdueCancellationTax')>=2 && cnt('CancellationOverdueBenefit')>=2 && cnt('CancellationOverdueBenefitTax')>=2; }

pm.expect(/refundable cap|cap/i.test(pm.response.text()), 'body must mention the refundable cap: ' + pm.response.text().substring(0,120)).to.be.true;

request.description: CARD booking carrying the stripe-mock's pm_card_captureFail: the immediate cancellation charge FAILS (card_declined) => markDueOnFailure books DUE entries + syncs OverdueCancellationLedger (SharedLogic/CancellationFee.hs). ride.onlinePayment stays TRUE so the fee is refundable after clearDues - unlike a cash booking, which createPaymentRefundRequest hard-rejects ('Could not refund cash ride').

item.name: Get Nearby Ride Requests (Driver) - ride B

exec: // Wait briefly before checking nearby requests
// Dashboard-compatible poll (the CLI retry hook is unavailable here). Driver-pool fires batches
// every ~22s; the freshly-created test driver may miss the first batch. Poll up to ~50s.
pm.test('Has search requests', function(){ pm.expect(0, 'driver pool empty after ~50s polling - driver not matched (check LTS driver_id / producer dispatch)').to.be.above(0); });
else { console.log('Pool empty on first check - polling driver pool (~22s batches)...'); _poll(40); }

item.name: Driver Arrived at Pickup - ride B

exec: // on_update(DRIVER_ARRIVED) can race KV/drainer visibility of the fresh BAP ride row and 500
// (RIDE_DOES_NOT_EXIST from getRideAndBooking) - rows are consistent in postgres moments later.
// Retry up to 8x5s before failing; the call is idempotent (sets driver_arrival_time).

function _fin(ok, detail){ pm.test('Driver arrived at pickup (retry-tolerant)', function(){ pm.expect(ok, detail||'').to.be.true; }); if(ok) console.log('Driver arrived at pickup - driver_arrival_time is now set'); }

function _retry(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url: pm.request.url.toString(), method:'POST', header:_hdrs(), body:{mode:'raw', raw: pm.variables.replaceIn(pm.request.body && pm.request.body.raw || '')} }, function(err,res){
else if(n<=0){ _fin(false, 'arrived/pickup still failing after retries: ' + (err|| (res&&res.code) ) + ' ' + (res? res.text().substring(0,160):'')); }
else { console.log('arrived/pickup retry, attempts left', n, 'last:', res&&res.code); setTimeout(function(){ _retry(n-1); }, 5000); }
if (pm.response.code === 200) { _fin(true); } else { console.log('arrived/pickup got', pm.response.code, '- retrying (KV visibility race)'); _retry(8); }

item.name: B: BPP overdue legs standing (driver 4.00+0.96, benefit 1.00+0.24, no commission)

exec: // Cash immediate-charge cancel => OverdueCancellationLedger: driver gets the overdue charge, the
// platform KEEPS (fee - overdue) as benefit (pass-through PAIR of equal legs per ref). No commission yet.
function _sumOf(rows,t){ return rows.filter(function(r){ return r.reference_type===t && r.status==='SETTLED' && !r.reversal_of; }).reduce(function(a,r){ return a+Number(r.amount); }, 0); }
function _legAmt(rows,t){ var l=rows.filter(function(r){ return r.reference_type===t && r.status==='SETTLED' && !r.reversal_of; }); return l.length? Number(l[0].amount): 0; }

function _ok(rows){ function cnt(t){ return rows.filter(function(r){ return r.reference_type===t && r.status==='SETTLED' && !r.reversal_of; }).length; } return cnt('OverdueCancellationCharge')>=2 && cnt('OverdueCancellationTax')>=2 && cnt('CancellationOverdueBenefit')>=2 && cnt('CancellationOverdueBenefitTax')>=2; }

pm.test('NO commission booked at cancel time (books only at settle)', function(){

item.name: AGG: Trigger AggregatedCommission job (real dashboard endpoint, Driver recipient)

exec: // Run-scoped periodStart: a 24h window would (a) sweep in invoices this pool driver earned in EARLIER runs and (b) trip the job's 'period already covered' guard when the driver was aggregated before. cf_run_started_at is stamped by the first step (30min staleness refresh).

var _jobData = JSON.stringify({ merchantId: pm.environment.get('helsinki_merchant_id'), merchantOperatingCityId: pm.environment.get('helsinki_moc_id'), issuedToId: pm.environment.get('cancelDriverId'), issuedToType: 'DRIVER', periodStart: pm.environment.get('agg_period_start'), periodEnd: pm.environment.get('agg_period_end') });
pm.environment.set('agg_trigger_body', JSON.stringify({ scheduledAt: new Date(Date.now() + 10*1000).toISOString(), jobName: 'AggregatedCommissionInvoiceCreationTrigger', jobData: _jobData }));

pm.test('real dashboard scheduler trigger accepted (200 Success)', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); var j = {}; try { j = pm.response.json(); } catch (e) {} pm.expect(j.result).to.eql('Success'); });
console.log('AggregatedCommissionInvoiceCreation scheduled via the REAL dashboard endpoint for driver', pm.environment.get('cancelDriverId'));

request.description: The REAL dashboard trigger (postMerchantSchedulerTrigger -> createJobIn -> DB scheduler_job -> allocator executes). Do NOT hand-forge AnyJob payloads via mock endpoints: jobs are consumed via the DB scheduler + reviver, and a forged payload never decodes (issuedToType 'Driver' vs 'DRIVER') - it sits un-ACKed in Available_Jobs forever. PRE-REQ: transporter_config.invoice_config.commissionAggregationEnabled = true (set by the kill-switch ON step) or the job Terminates ('chain ends') with scheduler_job.status = Failed and NO invoice. Must run AFTER the 'Switch Provider Dashboard to Helsinki' step (needs a Helsinki-pinned dashboard_token; the static Bangalore token 403s on the merchant/city path check). scheduledAt must be in the future or the endpoint 500s ('job can only be scheduled for now or for future'). Each successful run starts a self-perpetuating chain (next-period job lands Pending in scheduler_job - harmless locally).

item.name: AGG: Aggregated Commission invoice nets BOTH rides to ZERO (poll, strict)

exec: function _sums(inv){ var lines = []; try { lines = (typeof inv.line_items === 'string') ? JSON.parse(inv.line_items) : (inv.line_items || []); } catch (e) {} var fwd = 0, ref = 0, all = 0; lines.forEach(function(l){ all += Number(l.lineTotal); if (l.groupId === 'g-commission-cancellation') fwd += Number(l.lineTotal); if (l.groupId === 'g-commission-refund-cancellation') ref += Number(l.lineTotal); }); return { fwd: fwd, ref: ref, all: all }; }

pm.test('AggregatedCommission invoice exists for the ride-2 driver (within 120s poll)', function(){ pm.expect(rows.length, 'no AggregatedCommission invoice - job Failed or lagged: check scheduler_job.status and invoice_config.commissionAggregationEnabled').to.be.above(0); });
var inv = rows.slice().sort(function(a,b){ return String(a.created_at).localeCompare(String(b.created_at)); })[rows.length-1]; var s = _sums(inv);
pm.test('cancellation commission lines sum 1.674 (A settled-after-overdue full 0.93 + B standing-overdue 0.744)', function(){ pm.expect(s.fwd).to.be.closeTo(1.674, 0.02); });
pm.test('clawback lines sum -1.674 (all four cap/2 refunds claw exactly what was booked per ride)', function(){ pm.expect(s.ref).to.be.closeTo(-1.674, 0.02); });

pm.test('aggregate nets to EXACTLY zero (no completed rides; both fees fully refunded)', function(){ pm.expect(s.fwd + s.ref).to.be.closeTo(0, 0.02); pm.expect(Number(inv.total_amount)).to.be.closeTo(s.all, 0.005); pm.expect(Number(inv.total_amount)).to.be.closeTo(0, 0.005); });

function _poll(n){ pm.sendRequest({ url:_mockUrl()+'/mock/sql/select', method:'POST', header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body:{mode:'raw', raw:_sqlBody()} }, function(err,res){ var rows=[]; try{ rows=((res&&res.json())||{}).rows||[]; }catch(e){} if(_ok(rows) || n<=0){ _assert(rows); } else { setTimeout(function(){ _poll(n-1); }, 3000); } }); }
